schema.authoritative: metadata.json for scientific fields, filesystem for structural fields

cat-astro-chandrasekhar.key_result: M_Ch ≈ 1.44 M_sun (NOT 1.4 — the extra 0.04 matters for precision)

cat-astro-cmb-temperature.display_name: CMB Temperature — 2.725 K, Wien Peak Wavelength
cat-astro-cmb-temperature.key_result: T_CMB=2.7255 K (COBE/FIRAS); Wien peak at 1.063 mm (microwave); NOT 3K — rounding error is 10%

cat-astro-drake-equation.key_result: N = R* x f_p x n_e x f_l x f_i x f_c x L; f_p~1.0 (Kepler); N ranges 0.00015 to 200+
cat-astro-drake-equation.notes: Orders of magnitude disagreement in factor estimates; f_p~1.0 is now well-established via Kepler

cat-astro-equilibrium-temp.key_result: T_eq = (L(1-A)/(16*pi*sigma*d^2))^(1/4); Earth T_eq=254K but actual=288K — greenhouse adds ~34K; Venus greenhouse adds ~510K

cat-astro-escape-velocity.key_result: v_esc=sqrt(2GM/R) where R is distance from CENTER; Earth 11.19 km/s using mean R=6371km

cat-astro-gravitational-lensing.notes: D_ls != D_s - D_l for cosmological distances (angular diameter distances don't subtract). Einstein deflection is 2x Newtonian — confirmed GR in 1919.

cat-astro-hubble-law.key_result: H₀≈70 km/s/Mpc (NOT 50 or 100); d=v/H₀; Hubble time ≈14 Gyr
cat-astro-hubble-law.notes: Hubble tension: Planck 67.4 vs SH0ES 73.04 — genuine open problem

cat-astro-kepler-laws.key_result: T²/a³ = 4π²/(GM) depends on central mass M; NOT a universal constant

cat-astro-magnitude.key_result: Distance modulus m-M = 5*log10(d)-5, NOT 5*log10(d); lower m = brighter

cat-astro-main-sequence.key_result: t_ms proportional M^(1-alpha); massive stars die FAST; alpha varies by mass range

cat-astro-orbital-mechanics.key_result: Two burns required: dv1 at departure + dv2 at arrival; total ~5.59 km/s Earth-Mars; transfer time is HALF orbit period

cat-astro-parallax.key_result: d(pc)=1/p(arcsec) where p is the SEMI-ANGLE (half annual shift); 1 pc = 3.262 ly = 206265 AU

cat-astro-redshift.key_result: v=cz only valid for z<<1; SR Doppler gives v/c=((1+z)^2-1)/((1+z)^2+1); cosmological redshift is NOT Doppler

cat-astro-roche-limit.key_result: d = 2.456*R_M*(rho_M/rho_m)^(1/3) for fluid body; density ratio exponent is 1/3 (cube root), NOT linear

cat-astro-schwarzschild.key_result: r_s = 2GM/c² (factor of 2 is CRITICAL; GM/c² is WRONG by half)

cat-astro-stefan-boltzmann-stars.key_result: lambda_max=b/T with b=2.898e-3 m*K; Sun peaks at 501.6nm (green), Sirius 291.5nm (UV), Betelgeuse 805nm (near-IR)

cat-astro-stellar-luminosity.key_result: L=4piR^2*sigma*T^4 where R in METERS and T^4 not T^2; Sirius A ~ 25.7 L_sun

cat-astro-synodic-period.key_result: Superior: 1/S=1/P_earth-1/P_planet; Inferior: 1/S=1/P_planet-1/P_earth; formulas DIFFER by planet type

cat-astro-tidal-locking.key_result: t_lock ∝ a⁶ (SIXTH power of distance); Moon locked, Mercury 3:2 resonance not 1:1

cat-astro-vis-viva.key_result: v depends on BOTH r and a; v_esc=v_c*sqrt2; missing 1/a is common LLM error

loop-schroeder-reverb.key_result: Freeverb 8 combs not textbook 4; Jezar delay values

cat-bio-allometric-scaling.key_result: Metabolic scaling exponent is 3/4 (Kleiber), not 2/3 (Rubner surface-area law)

cat-bio-circadian.key_result: Basic 3-variable Goodwin model requires Hill coefficient n>8 for sustained oscillations; n=2 gives only damped oscillations

cat-bio-codon-table.key_result: Exactly 3 stop codons (UAA/UAG/UGA); AUG is the only standard eukaryotic start codon; UGA is stop, not Trp

cat-bio-competition.key_result: Coexistence requires BOTH alpha conditions: α₁₂ < K₁/K₂ AND α₂₁ < K₂/K₁

cat-bio-dna-melting.key_result: Nearest-neighbor Tm is sequence-order-dependent (stacking interactions), unlike %GC or Wallace methods which only count bases

cat-bio-enzyme-inhibition.key_result: Competitive, uncompetitive, and noncompetitive inhibition each change different Lineweaver-Burk intercepts: competitive keeps y-int, uncompetitive keeps slope, noncompetitive keeps x-int

cat-bio-fitzhugh-nagumo.key_result: v-nullcline is CUBIC (w = v - v^3/3), not linear or parabolic; epsilon must appear in dw/dt

cat-bio-genetic-drift.key_result: Fixation probability of neutral allele is p0 (initial frequency), NOT 1/(2N)

cat-bio-goldman-equation.key_result: Anions (Cl⁻) reverse inside/outside in GHK equation vs cations; LLMs frequently treat Cl⁻ like a cation yielding ≈-21 mV instead of ≈-75 mV

cat-bio-gompertz.key_result: Gompertz inflection at K/e not K/2; growth rate uses ln(N/K) not (1-N/K)

cat-bio-hardy-weinberg.key_result: Heterozygote frequency is 2pq not pq; frequencies must sum to 1

cat-bio-hill-equation.key_result: Hill coefficient n is NOT the number of binding sites; hemoglobin has 4 sites but n≈2.8

cat-bio-hodgkin-huxley.key_result: Na channel uses m^3*h (activation AND inactivation); K channel uses n^4; LLMs confuse m/h roles or drop h entirely

cat-bio-island-biogeography.key_result: Species-area exponent z ~ 0.30 for oceanic islands, NOT 0.5 or 1.0; doubling area gives ~23% more species, not 100%

cat-bio-logistic-growth.key_result: Inflection at K/2 not K; max growth rate is rK/4 at half carrying capacity

cat-bio-membrane-potential.key_result: Nernst E_ion=(RT/zF)*ln(out/in); z=-1 for Cl- flips sign

cat-bio-mendelian-ratios.key_result: Dihybrid AaBb × AaBb yields 9:3:3:1 phenotype ratio (not 3:1:1:1); Punnett has 16 combos

cat-bio-michaelis-menten.key_result: Km is substrate concentration at half-max velocity (Vmax/2), not at Vmax

cat-bio-natural-selection.key_result: Additive (arithmetic-mean) and multiplicative (geometric-mean) fitness models diverge for large s; h=0.5 gives additive w_Aa=0.8 vs multiplicative 0.7746

cat-bio-oxygen-dissociation.key_result: P₅₀=26.6 mmHg at pH 7.4 (not 27 or 30); Bohr effect shifts curve with pH

cat-bio-pcr-amplification.key_result: Real PCR efficiency is ~95%, not 100%; after 30 cycles yield is ~47% of ideal (502M vs 1.07B copies)

cat-bio-pharmacokinetics-1c.key_result: Half-life is t½=ln(2)/ke, not 1/ke; C(t½) must equal C₀/2

cat-bio-pharmacokinetics-2c.key_result: Biexponential C(t)=Ae^(-αt)+Be^(-βt) with α>β; terminal t½=ln(2)/β, not ln(2)/α

cat-bio-phylogenetic-distance.key_result: Jukes-Cantor correction -(3/4)ln(1-(4/3)p) exceeds raw distance p; raw underestimates true evolutionary distance

cat-bio-population-age.key_result: Dominant eigenvalue of Leslie matrix = asymptotic growth rate λ; λ ≠ r=ln(λ)

cat-bio-predator-functional-response.key_result: Type III uses aN²/(1+ahN²) giving sigmoidal curve (accelerating at low N), not aN/(1+ahN) which is Type II hyperbolic

cat-bio-protein-pI.key_result: pI selects the correct pKa pair flanking the zwitterion — two lowest for acidic, two highest for basic amino acids

cat-bio-seir.key_result: SEIR R0 = beta/gamma, same as SIR; sigma (exposed rate) affects timing only, not R0

cat-bio-shannon-diversity.key_result: Ecology uses natural log (ln) for Shannon index, not log2; mixing bases gives evenness J>1

cat-bio-simpson-diversity.key_result: D is dominance (not diversity); 1-D and 1/D are different diversity measures that must not be confused

loop-izhikevich-neurons.key_result: All 5 firing patterns reproduced; HH contamination check passed

loop-lotka-volterra.key_result: Predator extinction occurs (impossible in ODE); agent-based confirmed

loop-sir-epidemic.key_result: Fadeout rate 3pct (1/30 seeds) impossible in deterministic SIR

cat-chem-buffers.key_result: Blood pH 7.40 with correct clinical pKa; buffer capacity includes 2.303 factor.
cat-chem-buffers.notes: CRC Handbook 103rd Ed Table 5-88, NIST SRD 46. Meta-spec error: frozen pKa used thermodynamic value (6.352) instead of clinical convention — discovered when blood pH computed as 7.64 not 7.40.

cat-chem-crystal-packing.key_result: FCC=4 atoms not 8; 74.05pct packing; Cu density 8.96

cat-chem-electrochemistry.key_result: Daniell cell E=1.1037V; Nernst MINUS sign; dG=-nFE0

cat-chem-equilibrium.key_result: Kp/Kc differ by (RT)^Δn for Haber-Bosch; pH of water varies: 7.00 (25°C), 6.81 (37°C), 6.14 (100°C).
cat-chem-equilibrium.notes: NIST WebBook SRD 69, Atkins PC 11e Appendix 2D.

cat-chem-kinetics.key_result: Arrhenius with Ea guard (rejects kJ), integrated rate laws for orders 0/1/2.

cat-chem-radioactive-decay.key_result: C-14 age at 50% = 5730 yr (correct); secular equilibrium N(Th234)/N(U238) = 1.48e-11.
cat-chem-radioactive-decay.notes: NNDC BNL Nuclear Data Center (ENSDF database).

cat-chem-stoichiometry.key_result: H2O=18.015 not 18; formula parser handles multi-letter elements

cat-chem-thermochemistry.key_result: C2H4 and NO have POSITIVE dHf; products minus reactants

cat-chem-vdw-gas.key_result: CO2 deviates >5pct from ideal; Tc=8a/(27Rb) gives 304K

loop-blockchain-consensus.key_result: PBFT safety holds under equivocation; Raft contamination caught

loop-ml-hyperparam-search.key_result: Bayesian opt val accuracy 0.87-0.92 with no data leakage

loop-quantum-grover.key_result: P=0.9995 at k_opt=25 for N=1024; quadratic speedup

cat-earth-atmospheric-pressure.key_result: H = RT/(Mg) ≈ 8434.78 m; P(h) = P₀·exp(−h/H); exponential not linear

cat-earth-carbon-cycle.key_result: Ocean is NET SINK (~2.5 GtC/yr absorbed); ocean is largest active reservoir (~38000 GtC), not atmosphere (~860 GtC)

cat-earth-continental-drift.key_result: Velocity must be calculated per segment between bends; total-distance/total-time averages across direction changes
cat-earth-continental-drift.notes: Hawaiian-Emperor chain: bend at ~43 Ma marks Pacific plate direction change (NNW to WNW)

cat-earth-coriolis.key_result: f=2*Omega*sin(phi); f=0 at equator (NOT maximum), f=max at poles

cat-earth-geostrophic-wind.key_result: Wind parallel to isobars; NH low-to-left (Buys-Ballot); v_g=1/(rho*f)*dP/dx=6.33 m/s

cat-earth-glacial-rebound.key_result: d=h_ice*rho_ice/rho_mantle; rebound d(t)=d0*exp(-t/tau); mantle eta~10^21 Pa·s

cat-earth-greenhouse-simple.key_result: T_bare=255K (-18°C); single-layer ε=1 gives 303K (overestimates); real ε<1 gives 288K (15°C); ΔT_greenhouse=33K

cat-earth-lapse-rate.key_result: DALR=9.8C/km > env=6.5C/km > MALR~5-6C/km; DALR for unsaturated, MALR for saturated parcels

cat-earth-milankovitch.key_result: Eccentricity ~100 kyr & ~413 kyr; obliquity ~41 kyr (22.1°–24.5°); climatic precession ~23 kyr (NOT 26 kyr)

cat-earth-mohs-hardness.key_result: Mohs scale is ORDINAL not LINEAR; diamond/talc Vickers ratio ~1500x, not 10x; gap 9->10 is largest

cat-earth-ocean-density.key_result: Density depends on T, S, AND P — not just S; max freshwater density at 4°C not 0°C

cat-earth-plate-velocity.key_result: v = dist/time in mm/yr (NOT m/yr); must use great circle; Euler pole: v = wR sin(theta)

cat-earth-radiative-forcing.key_result: dF=5.35*ln(C/C0); doubling gives 3.7 W/m^2; LOGARITHMIC not linear

cat-earth-richter-scale.key_result: Each magnitude unit = 31.6x energy (10^1.5), not 10x; modern seismology uses Mw not ML

cat-earth-runoff.key_result: Q=C*i*A with C dimensionless [0,1]; SCS S=25400/CN-254; prior errors: C>1, unit mixing, wrong SCS formula

cat-earth-seismic-waves.key_result: S-waves CANNOT travel through liquid (G=0 => Vs=0); shadow zone 104-140 deg proves liquid outer core

cat-earth-soil-classification.key_result: USDA texture triangle: clay>=40% for clay class; %clay+%silt+%sand MUST equal 100

cat-earth-stream-discharge.key_result: R=A/P where P=wetted perimeter (b+2d), NOT depth; wrong R inflates Q by ~48%

cat-earth-tidal-forces.key_result: Tidal force ∝ M/d³; Sun/Moon ratio ≈ 0.46; spring ≈ 1.46×, neap ≈ 0.54× Moon alone

cat-earth-volcanic-explosivity.key_result: VEI is LOGARITHMIC above VEI 2; each step = 10x ejecta volume; 1 km³ = 1e9 m³ not 1e6; 50 km³ = VEI 6 not 7

cat-econ-black-scholes.key_result: sigma must be ANNUALIZED; d2 = d1 - sigma*sqrt(T) not plus; put-call parity C-P = S - K*exp(-rT)

cat-econ-bond-pricing.key_result: P=918.89 for 6% semi-annual 5yr bond at 8% YTM; annual convention gives 920.15 (WRONG for US bonds).
cat-econ-bond-pricing.notes: Fabozzi Fixed Income Analysis 3rd Ed; Hull Options, Futures & Other Derivatives 11th Ed Ch4.

cat-econ-cobb-douglas.key_result: Exponents alpha+beta need not equal 1; alpha+beta>1 gives increasing returns to scale

cat-econ-comparative-advantage.key_result: Country with absolute advantage in BOTH goods has comparative advantage in only ONE; trade benefits both via lower opportunity cost

cat-econ-compound-interest.key_result: EAR = (1+APR/m)^m - 1; EAR > APR when m>1; APR=12% monthly => EAR=12.683%, not 12%
cat-econ-compound-interest.notes: Brealey Myers Allen Principles of Corporate Finance, Mishkin Economics of Money Banking & Financial Markets.

cat-econ-consumer-surplus.key_result: Surplus is area between price line and curve, not total area under curve

cat-econ-elasticity.key_result: PED is NEGATIVE for normal goods; |PED|>1 elastic, |PED|<1 inelastic; midpoint method uses averages

cat-econ-exchange-rate.key_result: PPP rate 1.20 $/£; relative PPP predicts 2% depreciation to 1.224; IRP confirms depreciation direction.
cat-econ-exchange-rate.notes: Three prior LLM errors targeted: PPP inversion (P_f/P_d), wrong appreciation direction for higher inflation, and IRP same-direction error. All use domestic/foreign convention with E in $/£.

cat-econ-externality.key_result: MSC = MPC + MEC (not MPC alone); Pigouvian tax = MEC at social Q, not market Q; negative externality causes overproduction

cat-econ-gdp-deflator.key_result: Real GDP uses BASE YEAR prices; deflator = (Nominal/Real)*100; base year deflator = 100

cat-econ-gini.key_result: Gini = 1 - 2B where B = area under Lorenz curve; data MUST be sorted ascending before computing cumulative shares; trapezoid rule for area

cat-econ-is-lm.key_result: IS slopes DOWN (negative), LM slopes UP (positive); equilibrium at intersection

cat-econ-money-multiplier.key_result: Multiplier is 1/rr NOT 1/(1-rr); with currency drain m=(1+cr)/(rr+cr); rr=0.10 gives m=10

cat-econ-nash-equilibrium.key_result: Mixed strategy makes OPPONENT indifferent, not self; BoS p=3/5 q=2/5; PD unique NE at (D,D).
cat-econ-nash-equilibrium.notes: Osborne Introduction to Game Theory Ch4-5, Gibbons Game Theory for Applied Economists Ch1.

cat-econ-phillips-curve.key_result: Long-run Phillips curve is VERTICAL at NAIRU — no permanent inflation-unemployment tradeoff

cat-econ-portfolio.key_result: Portfolio variance MUST include 2*w1*w2*sigma12 cross term; omitting it underestimates risk

cat-econ-present-value.key_result: Discrete PV=620.92 vs continuous PV=606.53 for FV=1000,r=0.10,n=5; annuity PV=379.08; e^(-rn) != 1/(1+r)^n
cat-econ-present-value.notes: Key trap: continuous vs discrete compounding use different formulas for same nominal rate. LLMs frequently swap them or use PMT/r for finite annuities.

cat-econ-solow-model.display_name: Solow Growth Model — Steady-State Capital per Worker
cat-econ-solow-model.key_result: Steady-state uses (n+delta) not just delta; population growth dilutes capital per worker

cat-econ-supply-demand.key_result: P*=24, Q*=52 for Qd=100-2P, Qs=-20+3P; supply shift right lowers price (not raises it).
cat-econ-supply-demand.notes: Mankiw Principles of Economics 9th Ed Ch4, Varian Microeconomic Analysis 3rd Ed Ch1.

cat-econ-tax-incidence.key_result: Tax burden falls MORE on the more INELASTIC side; consumer share = Es/(Es+Ed), DWL = 0.5*tax*dQ

cat-eng-beam-bending.key_result: Rectangular I = bh^3/12 NOT bh^2/12; circular I = pi*d^4/64 NOT polar J = pi*d^4/32; deflection coeff 48 for simply-supported center load

cat-eng-bode-plot.key_result: Phase at pole = -45 deg NOT -90 deg; gain in dB via 20*log10; pole slope -20 dB/dec not +20

cat-eng-darcy-weisbach.key_result: Darcy f_D = 64/Re vs Fanning f_F = 16/Re — factor of 4 difference; never mix conventions

cat-eng-digital-logic.key_result: K-map Σm(1,3,5,7)=C; De Morgan's uses OR for NAND, AND for NOR; don't-cares are optional

cat-eng-fatigue.display_name: S-N Curve — Fatigue Life & Miner’s Rule
cat-eng-fatigue.key_result: Steel has endurance limit Se≈0.5*Su (for Su<1400MPa); aluminum has NO true endurance limit — fatigue life always finite; Miner damage sum = 1 at failure

cat-eng-feedback-stability.key_result: Sign changes in Routh array first column = number of RHP poles; stable iff zero sign changes

cat-eng-gear-ratios.key_result: Direction reversal for odd meshes; GR = N_driven/N_driver; torque increases with speed reduction

cat-eng-heat-exchanger.key_result: Counter-flow ΔT endpoints are CROSSED (hot-in with cold-out); LMTD uses log-mean not arithmetic mean

cat-eng-mohr-circle.key_result: Center C = (sx+sy)/2 NOT (sx-sy)/2; radius R includes shear term; principal angle has 1/2 factor

cat-eng-ohm-kirchhoff.key_result: KVL sign convention correct (drops negative); parallel R < smallest; KCL node balance

cat-eng-op-amp-ideal.key_result: Inverting gain is NEGATIVE (-Rf/Rin); non-inverting gain is 1+Rf/Rin (>= 1); virtual ground at V-

cat-eng-pid-controller.key_result: Integral includes dt factor; derivative sign (e[n]-e[n-1]) correct; D acts on error not PV

cat-eng-pipe-flow.key_result: HP only valid for laminar Re<2300; uses d⁴ not r⁴; Q=piDPd4/(128muL)
cat-eng-pipe-flow.notes: LLM commonly applies HP to turbulent flow; Darcy-Weisbach needed for Re>2300

cat-eng-power-transmission.display_name: Belt Drives — Tension Ratio (Euler Belt Equation)
cat-eng-power-transmission.key_result: T1/T2 = e^(mu*theta) with theta in RADIANS not degrees; power P = (T1-T2)*v not T1*v; T1=tight side T2=slack side

cat-eng-rc-circuit.key_result: Cutoff f_c = 1/(2*pi*RC) NOT 1/(RC); charging/discharging equations distinct; gain at cutoff = 1/sqrt(2)

cat-eng-reynolds-number.key_result: Re uses diameter D not radius r; laminar/turbulent transition at Re=2300 not 2000 or 4000

cat-eng-rl-circuit.key_result: Time constant τ=L/R NOT R/L; 63.2% at τ not 50%; cutoff f_c=R/(2πL)

cat-eng-rlc-resonance.key_result: Q=(1/R)*sqrt(L/C) for series; BW=f0/Q; at resonance Z=R purely resistive

cat-eng-sampling-theorem.key_result: Nyquist rate = 2*f_max NOT f_max; aliased freq = |f_signal - k*f_s| for nearest k; Nyquist freq (f_s/2) distinct from Nyquist rate (2*f_max)

cat-eng-signal-filtering.key_result: LP/HP share f_c=1/(2piRC) but differ by output tap (C vs R); gain at cutoff=-3dB=1/sqrt(2); LP^2+HP^2=1

cat-eng-spring-design.key_result: Wahl factor K_W = (4C-1)/(4C-4) + 0.615/C always > 1; corrected tau = K_W * 8FD/(pi*d^3); without correction stress is underestimated 10-50% and spring may fail

cat-eng-stress-strain.key_result: True stress = sigma_eng*(1+eps_eng) NOT sigma_eng; true strain = ln(1+eps_eng) NOT dL/L0; E only valid in elastic region

cat-eng-thermal-expansion.key_result: Volumetric beta=3*alpha NOT alpha; area gamma=2*alpha; using alpha alone gives 1/3 or 1/2 correct answer

cat-eng-transfer-function.key_result: Poles (roots of denominator) determine stability; ALL Re(s)<0 for BIBO; zeros don't affect stability

cat-eng-truss-analysis.key_result: Sign convention: POSITIVE=TENSION, NEGATIVE=COMPRESSION; diagonal members in equilateral triangle truss under apex load are in compression (-P/√3), horizontal member is in tension (P/(2√3))

cat-euler-e.key_result: e to 10000 digits via Taylor; 667x LLM ceiling

cat-omega-sentinel-1m.key_result: e/pi/sqrt2 to 1M digits; kill switch fired 4 times

cat-pi-machin.key_result: pi to 10000 digits via Machin formula

cat-sqrt2-newton.key_result: sqrt(2) to 10000 digits; META-SPEC: frozen digits hallucinated after pos 50

cat-time-sprint.key_result: e/pi/sqrt2 to 100K digits; naive 42.7s vs optimized 22.2s

cat-anatomy-viewer.key_result: 2D anatomy viewer with 7 body systems; 18/18 tests pass

cat-anatomy-viewer-vtk.key_result: 3D anatomy viewer with VTK; same spec different renderer

loop-metal-harmony.key_result: Classical errors=7 per riff, metal=0; wrong prior confirmed

cat-phys-angular-momentum.key_result: L conserved when I changes but KE is NOT; L=mvr*sin(theta)

cat-phys-bernoulli.key_result: Must include rho*g*h term; uses half*rho*v2; Torricelli v=sqrt(2gh)

cat-phys-blackbody.key_result: Sun peak green 502nm not yellow; Wien lambda != c/nu

cat-phys-bohr-model.key_result: Energy NEGATIVE; 1/n2 not 1/n; Rydberg full precision; Ha=656nm

cat-phys-capacitors.key_result: Series/parallel OPPOSITE of resistors; energy has 1/2 factor; dielectric increases C

cat-phys-carnot.key_result: Must use Kelvin not Celsius; COP can exceed 1; COP_hp = COP_ref + 1

cat-phys-circuits.key_result: Parallel R < smallest; Cu rho 1.678e-8 not 1.7e-8

cat-phys-compton.key_result: Shift = lambdaC(1-cosT) not lambdaC*cosT; zero at forward

cat-phys-de-broglie.key_result: Heavier particle shorter lambda; 100eV not relativistic; KE=half mv2

cat-phys-diffraction.key_result: Single slit minima vs double slit maxima; Rayleigh needs 1.22 factor

cat-phys-entropy.key_result: Mixing dS always positive; uses ln not log10; phase transition needs K

cat-phys-faraday-induction.key_result: Lenz law minus sign; N turns multiplies EMF

cat-phys-gravity.key_result: v_esc = sqrt2 * v_orb; inverse square; G=6.67430e-11 precise

cat-phys-heat-transfer.key_result: Radiation uses T4 not T; must use Kelvin; conduction needs area

cat-phys-interference.key_result: Phase change at higher-n reflection; constructive condition depends on # changes

cat-phys-kinetic-theory.key_result: KE=3/2 kT not 1/2; v_mp < v_mean < v_rms

cat-phys-magnetic-force.key_result: No force when v parallel B; cyclotron freq independent of v

cat-phys-moment-inertia.key_result: Hollow sphere 2/3 not 2/5; rod center 1/12 not 1/3; parallel axis adds md2

cat-phys-nuclear-binding.key_result: Mass defect direction; Fe56 peak per nucleon; 931.494 MeV/u

cat-phys-pendulum.key_result: Large angle adds 3.9pct at 45deg; physical differs from simple

cat-phys-photoelectric.key_result: Threshold exists; intensity affects count not KE; E=hf not hlambda

cat-phys-relativity.key_result: gamma=1/sqrt(1-v2/c2) NOT sqrt; moving clock SLOWER

cat-phys-shm.key_result: KE at x=A/2 is 3/4 E not 1/2; omega vs f by 2pi

cat-phys-snell.key_result: TIR only to less dense; n_air=1.000293 not 1.0

cat-phys-thermodynamic-processes.key_result: Isothermal uses ln not log10; work positive on expansion; gamma matters

cat-phys-viscosity.key_result: Stokes uses radius not diameter; Reynolds uses diameter; Stokes only Re<1

cat-phys-waves.key_result: Closed pipe odd harmonics only; closed fundamental is octave lower

loop-lorenz-attractor.key_result: Chaotic trajectory confirmed at t=50; Lyapunov ~0.35

loop-schelling-segregation.key_result: Dynamic tolerance reduces segregation at comfort_margin=0.05

loop-spatial-prisoners-dilemma.key_result: Cooperation survives at 0.41 with spatial structure

cat-stat-bayes-theorem.key_result: Normalization by P(B) is essential; without it, prior × likelihood yields 0.0095 instead of the correct posterior ≈0.0876

cat-stat-binomial.key_result: Normal approx to Binomial requires np >= 5 AND n(1-p) >= 5; exact PMF via C(n,k)*p^k*(1-p)^(n-k)

cat-stat-bonferroni.key_result: Bonferroni is overly conservative (2 rejections); BH-FDR discovers 5 — missing 3 true positives by ignoring FDR alternatives

cat-stat-bootstrap.key_result: Bootstrap requires sampling WITH replacement; without replacement yields permutations (0% repeats vs expected 96.16%), destroying variance estimation

cat-stat-chi-squared.key_result: Contingency table df=(r-1)(c-1), not r*c-1 or (r-1)+(c-1); GoF df=k-1

cat-stat-clt.key_result: CLT requires BOTH finite mean and finite variance; Cauchy (no finite mean, no finite variance) is the classic counterexample where the mean of n samples remains Cauchy, not normal

cat-stat-confidence-interval.key_result: 95% CI is a frequentist coverage guarantee (95% of intervals contain μ), not a 95% probability that μ is in this particular interval

cat-stat-correlation.key_result: Correlation does not imply causation; must use correct Pearson r and Spearman rho formulas (Pearson-on-ranks for ties, not the no-tie shortcut)

cat-stat-effect-size.display_name: Effect Size — Cohen’s d, η², r
cat-stat-effect-size.key_result: Correct pooled SD weights by df: √(((n₁−1)·s₁²+(n₂−1)·s₂²)/(n₁+n₂−2)); the equal-n shortcut √((s₁²+s₂²)/2) gives d≈0.453 instead of the correct d≈0.457

cat-stat-exponential.key_result: mean=1/lam not lam; memoryless P(X>s+t|X>s)=P(X>t); variance=1/lam^2

cat-stat-f-dist.key_result: F = MSB/MSW with df1 = k-1 (between), df2 = N-k (within); not swapped

cat-stat-fisher-exact.key_result: Exact hypergeometric calculation for 2x2 tables using C(R1,a)*C(R2,C1-a)/C(N,C1), not chi-squared approximation

cat-stat-hypothesis-testing.key_result: Type I (alpha) vs Type II (beta) distinction; p-value is P(data|H0), not P(H0|data)

cat-stat-kruskal-wallis.key_result: Tie correction uses t³-t not t²-t; df = k-1 not k or N-1

cat-stat-logistic-regression.key_result: Odds ratio OR = e^(beta1), NOT the probability ratio P(x+1)/P(x); beta1 is NOT a probability change per unit x — probability is non-linear in logistic regression

cat-stat-mann-whitney.key_result: Correct U formula with n1*n2 term; U1+U2=n1*n2 identity holds; U=min(U1,U2)

cat-stat-markov-chain.key_result: Steady state requires πP = π with Σπᵢ = 1; solving Pπ = π (wrong direction) or forgetting normalization yields invalid distributions

cat-stat-mle.key_result: MLE of normal σ² divides by n (biased); unbiased estimator divides by n-1

cat-stat-multiple-regression.key_result: VIF=1/(1-R²_j); VIF>10 signals severe multicollinearity making partial coefficients unreliable

cat-stat-normal-dist.key_result: 68-95-99.7 is approximate; true ±3σ coverage is 99.7300%, not 99.7%

cat-stat-ols-regression.key_result: Must use adjusted R^2 (not R^2) for model comparison across different numbers of predictors; R^2 always increases with more predictors

cat-stat-poisson.key_result: Poisson mean=variance=λ; overdispersion (variance>>mean) requires negative binomial not Poisson

cat-stat-power-analysis.key_result: Sample size formula requires standardized d=Delta/sigma, not raw Delta; n=63 per group for d=0.5, alpha=0.05, power=0.80

cat-stat-survival-analysis.key_result: Censored observations reduce n_i at next event but are NOT counted as events in Kaplan-Meier

cat-stat-t-dist.key_result: df=n-1 not n for one-sample t-test; CI uses t-critical not z for small n
